DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT FLO-SHOW, LLC'S MOTION FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS FOR FAILURE TO ATTEND DEPOSITION IS DENIED. IT APPEARS FROM THE PAPERS THAT DEFENDANT FLO-SHOW LLC WAS AWARE PRIOR TO THE DATE OF THE NOTICED DEPOSITION THAT PLAINTIFF DID NOT INTEND TO PROCEED WITH THE DEPOSITION. calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-25-2012 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-24-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court VACATED its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT FLO-SHOW, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is off calendar. REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION FILED ON AUGUST 21, 2012. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2012 Continued To Nov-13-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $350.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is reset to NOV-13-2012 at 2:00 PM in Department 610. Written sanction order not issued. Sanctions vacated after hearing. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Monetary Sanctions For Failure To Attend Deposition And Pos
Off Calendar Sep-04-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Justin Campagne, Esq. of Campagne Campagne & Lerner, Tel. 559.255.1637, for defendant and moving party, via court call;
No other appearance.

RULING: Mr. Campagne stipulated for the matter to be heard by the judge pro tem. The matter was argued. The court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT FLO-SHOW, LLC's Motion For Monetary Sanctions For Failure To Attend Deposition is Denied. It appears from the papers that Defendant Flo-Show LLC was aware prior to the date of the noticed deposition that plaintiff did not intend to proceed with the deposition. No sanctions will be imposed. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported

Defendant'S Motion For Monetary Sanctions, Etc. (For Entry Of Tentative Ruling)
Off Calendar Sep-04-2012 Text Ruling

Notice And Application For Right To Attach Order And Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Nov-29-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC., DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU'S Notice And Application For Right To Attach Order And for Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment (as to The Eiger, LLC dba Campagnia, Agent for service, Richard D. Rosman, a Professional Corporation) is Granted. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn, not reported.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-14-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. DEFENDANT JOSEPH PRESSUTTI'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is off calendar. This defendant was dismissed on August 22, 2011. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
